description: Manual per-tender overrides keyed by TfL btID (the numeric ID from the tender result URL: tfl.gov.uk/forms/13796.aspx?btID=<id>). Any field set here wins over scraped data when push-to-supabase.js writes to the `tenders` table. Use this to correct typos, add notes TfL hasn't published, backfill missing values where TfL listed N/A, or mark a tender as superseded. Entries whose key starts with an underscore (e.g. `_example`) are ignored — use them for documentation. Re-run `npm run push-to-supabase` to apply.

_example_partial.notes: Cost-per-mile recalculated after TfL clarified mileage in 2024-Q2 contract addendum.

tenders._2010_note: btID 2010 (Route 265) — TfL's published table is mis-aligned by one row: highest-bid value duplicated into cost-per-mile, true cost (4.75) ended up in reason-not-lowest. Override below corrects it.

2010.notes: Awarded on new electrics. (cost_per_mile + highest_bid manually corrected from TfL's misaligned published row — see https://tfl.gov.uk/forms/13796.aspx?btID=2010)

tenders._309_note: btID 309 (Route 290) — TfL's cost-per-mile cell shows 3015 with no decimal. Implausible (accepted bid £1.2 M PA against £3015/mile would imply ~400 miles/year of running). Nulling the bad value rather than guessing.

309.notes: Cost-per-mile of 3015 in TfL's published data is a typo and has been nulled. Real value likely £3-£8/mile but unverifiable without TfL clarification.
